subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! I am well-pleased with thee and exceedingly glad. Praise be to God, thou art a believer in the Primal Point [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان من از تو راضیم و به نهایت خوشنود الحمد لله مومن به نقطه اولائی
subcodes.subjects: @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement
